title: 🔥估值重回历史深寒区
body: 市场处于历史级别的估值底部。AHR999(3D) 报 0.32，7 日暴跌 27.2%。该数值已低于 2022 年 7 月月均值 0.37，逼近当年 0.26 的极限低点。价格严重偏离 200 日成本线 19.8%，表明短期抛压已将价格砸穿长期持有者平均成本，浮盈筹码几乎被完全清洗。极致低估往往对应高盈亏比。偏多。底部构筑还需多久？
body_en: The market is sitting at historic valuation lows. AHR999 (3D) hits 0.32, dumping 27.2% in 7 days. We’re below the July 2022 monthly average of 0.37 and nearing the extreme low of 0.26 from that year. Price is trading 19.8% below the 200-day cost basis—showing short-term selling pressure has smashed price through long-term holders' average cost. Floating profit is almost fully purged. Extreme undervaluation means high upside. Leaning bullish. How much longer for the bottom to form?
